title: Junior Instructional Designer at Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions:
Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions!
